concerns.text: SC-002 states correlation coefficients are 'measured against the expected strong correlations for certain metric pairs' — no quantitative threshold defines 'strong' (e.g., r ≥ 0.7). This is unverifiable: implementer cannot confirm pass/fail.
SC-005 references 'specified GHA job window constraint' but no constraint value is defined in the spec. Measurable SC must state the actual threshold (e.g., '≤6 hours').
SC-006 references 'predefined RAM constraint' but no value is specified. The Edge Cases mention '7 GB RAM constraint' — SC-006 should explicitly reference this value for verifiability.
FR-003 specifies 'CPU-only mode' which is an implementation detail. Consider moving to technical-design or clarifying as a performance constraint rather than functional requirement.
Assumptions mention '6-hour compute window' but SC-005 references 'GHA job window constraint' — terminology inconsistency. Align to single term for traceability.
